content.en:
Although Ye Tian doesn't need the Merge Dao treasure, he can easily Merge the Dao, but it doesn't mean that he is not interested in the Merge Dao treasure!

Some of the Merge Dao treasures play an auxiliary role, and there are no sequelae, Xiao Yue and Ye Yu need this kind of Merge Dao treasures, and the rest of the human race also need Hedao treasures.

For the Terrans, Ye Tian is very attentive and wants to do his best to develop the Terrans.

If the human race gave birth to a large number of Dao ancestors, even in the face of the prosperous era in the future, it would be enough to protect itself.

Moreover, he also needs a lot of resources.

At present, he really has no shortage of resources, but if he is promoted to the top-level True Ancestor level or even the Dao Ancestor level, some top-level resources will not be enough.

Sometimes, no amount of ordinary resources can be exchanged for a top-tier resource.

For example, now, the entire net worth of 10,000 top true ancestors should not be exchanged for a 100% Arcana that can help Hedao, but in fact, the value of that Arcana itself is not very high.

But everyone in this realm wants that kind of Hedao treasure, so they are naturally willing to go bankrupt to buy it.

In fact, no one wants to sell it, because a Hedao treasure often represents a Dao Ancestor.

If a few more Dao Ancestors can be born, the top forces are willing to spend all their wealth, because there are more Dao Ancestors and their strength is stronger, so they have the ability to obtain more resources.

More than 100 years have passed.

this day.

The Yuan Qi Dao Ancestor informed the half-step True Ancestors of the Void Heaven Hall that the ruins had been born.

As a result, a half-step true ancestor of the Void Heaven Hall left the Void Heaven True Realm one after another, and only a few half-step true ancestors thought that their strength was not enough, so they didn't dare to take risks and gave up this opportunity.

This choice can't be wrong, after all, if you are safe, you can at least live a long time, and if you are lucky in the future, you may be able to get the opportunity to be promoted to Dao Ancestor!

-------------

The Dark Realm True Kingdom.

This is the true kingdom of the Dark Domain Demon Sect, and this time the ruins appear in this true kingdom.

The Dark Domain Demon Sect is not very strong, there is only one Dao Ancestor, it is a double Heavenly Dao Ancestor, there are many such big forces in the chaos, it is a very ordinary big force, only better than some forces that only have one Heavenly Dao Ancestor.

Unlike other True Kingdoms, the Dark Realm True Kingdom is filled with an energy called Dark Demon Qi, which is the environment that the Dark Demon Sect forcibly transforms.

In the Dark Demon Qi environment, the cultivation speed of the powerhouses of the Dark Demon Sect will be fast.

And because the dark demonic aura is relatively strong, the overall appearance of the Dark Realm True Kingdom is relatively gloomy.

Boom!!

A teleportation array, a half-step true ancestor appeared here, and Ye Tian was among them.

This is a giant city not far from the ruins, the Dark Spirit City, where all half-step true ancestors must be teleported here through a cross-border teleportation array, and then enter that ruin from here.

Ye Tian came to the Dark Domain True Kingdom, sensed the environment here, and couldn't help frowning.

Although the environment didn't affect him, he didn't like to stay here.

"A lot of half-step True Ancestors!"

Ye Tian glanced around and said secretly.

Not to mention the half-step True Ancestors who have not yet arrived here, the number of Half-Step True Ancestors in Dark Spirit City alone has probably reached as many as 100,000.

100,000 half-step true ancestors, if they don't fall, they will be 100,000 true ancestors in the future!

This number was simply too much in the past, and there was no way to gather so many True Ancestors in any one place, but now it is very normal, and the number of True Ancestors will increase.

With the arrival of a famous half-step true ancestor, the information about this relic gradually spread among the half-step true ancestors, and Ye Tian also knew more about this relic.

Since it was not clear what was going on inside the ruins, it was impossible to let all the half-step true ancestors enter at once, and a small group of half-step true ancestors had to be sent into it.

And the specific news was passed on by those half-step true ancestors.

Today, things are mixed.

First, this relic is very weird, the environment is very harsh, it seems to be a forbidden land, a forbidden land belonging to the domain realm, to be exact, it should be a fragment of a forbidden land!

"Infinite Abyss Fragments!"

Ye Tian muttered to himself.

The Infinite Abyss is an abyss in the Domain Realm, a forbidden place that was born out of the gathering of the dark energy of the Endless Years after the Domain Realm was opened up.

The reason why it is a forbidden land is because once a strong person above the True Ancestor enters it, he will encounter great horrors, and the power above the True Ancestor is almost impossible to use in the Infinite Abyss.

Therefore, once the True Ancestor and the Dao Ancestor enter the Infinite Abyss, they will almost certainly die, and only some of the strongest among the Dao Ancestors can be sure of surviving in the Infinite Abyss.

There are nine layers of the Infinite Abyss, and it is not clear which layer of abyss fragments fell here.

But no matter what layer of abyss fragments it is, its threat is very big, and the biggest danger is the abyss monster!

Abyssal monsters are full of blood, killing, and aiming to kill all living things, and even kill each other all the time.

The Abyssal Monsters are very strong and very difficult to kill, and the only flaw is that they have little intelligence.

But once surrounded by a large number of abyss monsters, no matter how strong it is, it is very dangerous.

"The fragments of the Domain Boundary pass through the Dark Forbidden Domain, and the abyssal monsters inside this ruin should have been almost dead in the first place, but the Infinite Abyss can always give birth to abyssal monsters. There was once a Ninefold Heavenly Dao Ancestor who fought into the Infinite Abyss with a supreme Dao weapon, swept across the nine layers of the Infinite Abyss, and almost annihilated all the abyssal monsters, but many years later, the Infinite Abyss was once again full of abyss monsters. "

This was the information that Ye Tian knew from the Black Wind Mountain Classic Book Space.

It can be said that the infinite abyss is not destroyed, and the abyss monsters cannot be completely destroyed.

The Infinite Abyss is indeed extremely dangerous, but it has always attracted a lot of True Monarchs and Half-Step True Ancestors, they have entered the Infinite Abyss, although most of them have fallen, but many of them have gained great benefits, many of which have gained some Hedao treasures.

Because of this, the Infinite Abyss is both a forbidden place and a cradle of dreams for a half-step True Ancestor.

this day.

The Infinite Abyss Fragment Ruins were officially opened to all Half-Step True Ancestors, and a Half-Step True Ancestor passed through the entrance of the ruins and entered the Infinite Abyss Fragments.

......

On the dry and pitch-black vast earth, the corpses of abyssal monsters full of ancient aura were everywhere, many of them had been broken, and even turned into white bones, but the cold chill still filled the heart of every half-step true ancestor.

Ye Tian walked on such a land, and he was also very dignified.

He was sure that there must be abyssal monsters here, otherwise the corpses of many abyssal monsters would not be so mutilated, as if they had been gnawed by other abyssal monsters.

Roar!

A roar was heard.

"The Abyss Monster is here!"

Ye Tian said in a low voice.
